channel.title: Tony's Website :) on johndoe
channel.description: Recent content in Tony's Website :) on johndoe

item.title: Mermaid JS support
item.description: If you want to use Mermaid-JS on your website. Provide mermaid as Shortcode in your markdown file. flowchart LR A --> B B --> C C --> D D --> B sequenceDiagram participant Alice participant Bob Alice->>Bob: Hi Bob Bob->>Alice: Hi Alice Find more example on Mermaid-JS website.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.

item.title: Placeholder Text
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: Math Typesetting
item.description: Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.

item.title: Emoji Support
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.

item.title: Cola bottle cap
item.description: This bottle cap for Coca-Cola glass bottles makes them reusable and reduces waste. It also comes with a paracord to decrease the chances of losing the cap. Material Used: TPU. STL FCStd GLTF

item.title: iPhone IBM case
item.description: This is a iphone SE case branded IBM. I design it for my company phone back when I used to work for IBM. FCStd Case Material black TPU: case STL case GLTF Logo Material white PLA: logo STL logo GLTF Credit to Leo10698 for the iPhone SE case iphone se 2020 / 8 / 7 flexible case by Leo10698 on Thingiverse: https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:4766166

item.title: Personal Rice - Desktop Environment
item.description: Personal Rice - Desktop Environment Collection of scripts to install all programs and configuratios for my xfce4+awesomeWm setup Requirements ~Debian~ Arch linux must be already installed before running this scripts. A clean installation with archinstall should do the work. Steps This is the list of steps needed before running this script (Arch linux) setup keyboard layout laodkeys us check internet connection ip link update time timedatectl status partition disk using fdisk.

item.title: Personal Website
item.description: Personal Website to read to understand hugo https://tangenttechnologies.ca/blog/hugo-themes/ https://github.com/luizdepra/hugo-coder/tree/main/docs

item.title: title
item.description: about h1 title about me h2 h2
